title: Vanilletix Shaders
description: A shader pack that is created to improve the graphics of your game, leaving it in vanilla style

# What is Vanilletix Shaders?

Vanilletix Shaders is a community-driven enhancement project led by ara_mat, built upon the acclaimed [Super Duper Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla) shader pack by [Eldeston](https://modrinth.com/user/Eldeston). Since its initial release two years ago, the project has garnered over 500,000 downloads across Modrinth and CurseForge.

![decor_mid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/091f074c288793684339b0d942eab46423f74028.png)

# Why Choose Vanilletix Over Super Duper Vanilla?

### Vanilletix expands on the original foundation with:

- **Enhanced Customization Flexibility**
- **Optimized Performance**
- **Expanded Feature Set**
- **and more..**

![decor_mid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/091f074c288793684339b0d942eab46423f74028.png)
